claim: Every docs/gen/ projection generated by plain `hotam gen-spec` (implemented_by TRACEABILITY.md/COVERAGE.md/REPO-MAP.md's own Build* functions) MUST render byte-identically regardless of whether the SAME `gen-spec` invocation also passed `--spec`, EXCEPT SPEC.md itself, which ALWAYS remains the sole `--spec`-shaped artifact whose staleness is separately enforced by check_spec_md_current.
why: task #334 (R4F-bind-test, fourth external review §4.3): the requirement landed SETTLED/PROSE with empty implemented_by/verified_by despite a real regression test for exactly this property already existing and being named in the requirement's own claim evidence — TestGenSpec_SharedProjectionsModeIndependent (cmd/hotam/gen_spec_test.go). This claim is about GENERATOR/engine behavior (a property of cmd/hotam/gen_spec.go and internal/generator/traceability.go+coverage.go), the same shape as the neighboring R-empty-content-gen-notice, which binds via enforced_by to a bare Test* name rather than the authored implemented_by+verified_by path (that path is reserved for path-qualified references into a domain's own authored spec/ tree, per internal/invariants/authored_links.go and PLAN-authored-spec-discipline.md §5/§12's disjunctive gate — an engine-self-hosting requirement is not forced to fabricate one). Binding enforced_by alone satisfies check_enforced_requires_enforcer_or_authored_link's disjunction and check_enforced_by_resolvable resolves TestGenSpec_SharedProjectionsModeIndependent via the repo-wide cmd/**/*_test.go scan. Mechanical traceability-completion fix, not a new judgment call — decision-ref: task #334, review-sourced finding, linking an existing test to an existing requirement.
